# The Post-it switch, made real — RCV-IRV: Green eliminated, Blue 10, Purple 9

*Generated from [`bv2178_8kg698_irv.yaml`](../bv2178_8kg698_irv.yaml) — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: `python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/tools_adam/scripts/build_yaml_pages.py`.*

**Method:** [RCV-IRV (Instant Runoff)](../../../../00_start_here/RCV_IRV) · **1 seat** · **Expected winner:** Blue

**▶ Live on BetterVoting:** [vote](https://bettervoting.com/8kg698) · **[results ↗](https://bettervoting.com/8kg698/results)** (election `8kg698`).

## Scenario

One of four races in the Post-it switch election (BV2178, bvid 8kg698;
BV-confirmed). Equal Vote's video "Updated: How does RCV work? — With
Post-its!" (https://youtu.be/Vte4nly_Neg) asks: what if round 2 had
eliminated Green instead of Blue? Its answer — Blue jumps to 10 and wins
10-9 — is a hypothetical RCV-IRV itself would never execute (Green held 7
votes to Blue's 4). This election makes it REAL with the smallest possible
nudge: two of the six Green>Blue>Pink voters genuinely prefer Blue first
(Blue>Green>Pink). Now round 1 is Purple 7, Blue 6, Green 4, Pink 3; round
2 Purple 8, Blue 6, Green 5 — GREEN is eliminated, all four remaining
Green>Blue>Pink ballots transfer to Blue, and the final is the video's
exact hypothetical tally: Blue 10, Purple 9 (1 exhausted). Two ballots
moved; the winner flipped from Purple to Blue — RCV-IRV finds Blue's
head-to-head strength only when Blue's supporters put Blue FIRST. See the
fairness lesson page: postit_video_fair_and_balanced.md.

Live results: https://bettervoting.com/8kg698/results
Companion races: bv2178_8kg698_star.yaml, bv2178_8kg698_ranked_robin.yaml.
Overview page: bv2178_8kg698_switch_made_real.md

## Ballots

Each row is one voter's ranking, most-preferred first (`N:` prefix = N identical ballots).

```text
Purple
Purple
Purple
Purple
Purple
Purple
Purple
Green>Blue>Pink
Green>Blue>Pink
Green>Blue>Pink
Green>Blue>Pink
Blue>Green>Pink
Blue>Green>Pink
Blue>Pink
Blue>Pink
Blue>Green>Pink
Blue>Purple
Pink>Green>Purple
Pink>Purple
Pink
```

Full report from the [`_tabulated` mirror](../cases_tabulated/bv2178_8kg698_irv_tabulated.txt) (regenerated on every run; every analysis forced on):

```text

  The Post-it switch, made real — RCV-IRV: Green eliminated, Blue 10, Purple 9
 Tabulating 20 ballots (ranked ballots).

ROUND 1
Candidate      Votes  Status
-----------  -------  --------
Purple             7  Hopeful
Blue               6  Hopeful
Green              4  Hopeful
Pink               3  Rejected

ROUND 2
Candidate      Votes  Status
-----------  -------  --------
Purple             8  Hopeful
Blue               6  Hopeful
Green              5  Rejected
Pink               0  Rejected
Blank Votes        1  Rejected

FINAL RESULT
Candidate      Votes  Status
-----------  -------  --------
Blue              10  Elected
Purple             9  Rejected
Green              0  Rejected
Pink               0  Rejected
Blank Votes        1  Rejected


Winner(s) — RCV / Instant-Runoff Voting (single winner)
  Blue
```

Run it yourself:

```bash
python STARVote_LH_tabulation_engine/starvote_larry_hastings.py method_comparisons/postit_rcv_example/cases/bv2178_8kg698_irv.yaml
```
